title: Exhibit Additons: A ZAWA Addon
description: Exhibit Additions is an add-on for ZAWA Evolved and requires ZAWA Evolved to play!
body:
EA DOES REQUIRE ZAWA EVOLVED BASE MOD TO FUNCTION! 

Exhibit Additions is a ZAWA addon that showcases not only icons of various global ecosystems, but also dives into the hidden gems that are barely in the limelight of modern media. 

Exhibit Additions (EA for short) fits perfectly alongside the amazing animals in the ZAWA Evolved mod, and its "spin off" addons Lil Critters, WOTW, Eco Regions & Essentials! There is a clear primate focous within the mod alongside a small knack of hoofstock and small mammals!

Thank you to our community aswell for bearing with us in this... lengthy development progress!

CREDITS: Platinum(OWNER), HelloCrossy67, heavy808s, ArtyArticus
